response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer with genuine breadth across embedded, web, and infrastructure domains, and his current role at re:cinq does touch agentic workflows and MCP tooling. However, the role demands 8+ years of production AI delivery, and the candidate's AI-adjacent experience effectively begins in April 2025 — roughly two months of relevant work. Python is entirely absent from the resume despite being a primary required language. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph or CrewAI, all of which are core to this Staff-level position.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and agentic workflow development in current role — directly maps to a key technology listed in the JD
Staff-level engineering track record with TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, and event-driven microservices across multiple production environments
Strong culture of technical mentorship and knowledge sharing (Refactoring Dojos, Selenium courses, public talks) aligns with the mentoring and engineering-excellence responsibilities
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume; it is the primary language specified in both required and preferred qualifications
No demonstrable experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or quantifiable AI-system optimization — the technical core of this role
The sole GenAI experience dates to April 2025 (~2 months), falling far short of the 8-year minimum for production AI delivery required at Staff level

key_factors.factor: RAG / vector DB / LLM eval gap
